basic_details.job_title: Old Civil Hospital Ambala Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer/ Radiation Therapy Technologist Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer / Radiation Therapy Technologist
basic_details.short_information: Old Civil Hospital Ambala Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer/ Radiation Therapy Technologist Notification 2026 has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website of Old Civil Hospital Ambala. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Old Civil Hospital Ambala Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer and Radiation Therapy Technologist.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC & BC candidates as per Haryana Government policy (restricted to Haryana domicile candidates only)

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Physics with Post Graduate Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics and 12 months internship, Basic Degree in Science with Physics and PG Degree in Radiological/Medical Physics with 12 months internship, RSO Certificate, 2 years experience as Medical Physicist/RSO, 10+2 with Science, 2 years Radiation Therapy Technologist course with field training and 2 years experience, B.Sc in Radiation Therapy Technology with 1 year experience
qualification.details: Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer (GEN): A PG Degree in Physics from a recognized university & Post Graduate Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized University with a internship of minimum 12 months in a Radiotherapy centre/Institute OR A basic Degree in Science from a recognized University with Physics as one of the main subject and Post graduate degree in Radiological/ Medical Physics from recognized University with an internship of minimum 12 months in a radiotherapy Centre/ institute. WITH i. Certificate from the Competent authority to function as Radiological Safety Officer(RSO) in Radiotherapy. ii. 2 years working experience as Medical Physicist /RSO in a radiotherapy Centre/ institute. Radiation Therapy Technologist (RTT) (BC-B): 10+2 or equivalent with Science subjects from recognized Board. i. 2 years Radiation Therapy technologist course or equivalent from a recognized institution with in field training in Radiotherapy ii. 2 years post qualification experience in a Radiotherapy Centre/ institute OR i. B.Sc degree in Radiation Therapy technology from recognized university. ii. 1 year experience in a radiotherapy centre/institute after acquiring the requisite qualification.

content_sections.heading: Old Civil Hospital Ambala Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer (GEN): A PG Degree in Physics from a recognized university & Post Graduate Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized University with a internship of minimum 12 months in a Radiotherapy centre/Institute OR A basic Degree in Science from a recognized University with Physics as one of the main subject and Post graduate degree in Radiological/ Medical Physics from recognized University with an internship of minimum 12 months in a radiotherapy Centre/ institute. WITH i. Certificate from the Competent authority to function as Radiological Safety Officer(RSO) in Radiotherapy. ii. 2 years working experience as Medical Physicist /RSO in a radiotherapy Centre/ institute. Radiation Therapy Technologist (RTT) (BC-B): 10+2 or equivalent with Science subjects from recognized Board. i. 2 years Radiation Therapy technologist course or equivalent from a recognized institution with in field training in Radiotherapy ii. 2 years post qualification experience in a Radiotherapy Centre/ institute OR i. B.Sc degree in Radiation Therapy technology from recognized university. ii. 1 year experience in a radiotherapy centre/institute after acquiring the requisite qualification.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Old Civil Hospital Ambala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Old Civil Hospital Ambala Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Old Civil Hospital Ambala?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Old Civil Hospital Ambala recruitment is 31 March 2027. Interviews are conducted every Thursday until this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer / Radiation Therapy Technologist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Medical Physicist cum Radiation Safety Officer and Radiation Therapy Technologist at Old Civil Hospital Ambala.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC & BC candidates as per Haryana Government policy.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Old Civil Hospital Ambala recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Radiation Therapy Technologist post?
faq.answer: For the Radiation Therapy Technologist post, candidates need to have completed 10+2 with Science subjects and a 2-year Radiation Therapy Technologist course with field training, or a B.Sc degree in Radiation Therapy Technology with 1 year of experience.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview, Document Verification, and the creation of a Merit List based on Qualification, Experience, and Interview marks.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the job type for these positions at Old Civil Hospital Ambala is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Old Civil Hospital Ambala office. Specific timings should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Age relaxation is restricted to Haryana domicile candidates only. It is advisable to check the official notification for complete eligibility details regarding domicile.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Old Civil Hospital Ambala?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Old Civil Hospital Ambala recruitment is 31 March 2027. Interviews are conducted every Thursday until this date.
